vector_metrics.basis: S_t reprojected from MODEL_WEIGHTS (fatigue+tactical+psychology); L_t mu_bias from DC-lambda residuals, sigma_chaos from weather+referee

scenarios.label: Base case
scenarios.note: The most likely flow — CAI's consensus across form, tactics and momentum.

scenarios.label: Upside · France click
scenarios.note: France's current form holds and they convert their chances — the tie opens up and they pull clear.

scenarios.label: Downside · Morocco frustrates
scenarios.note: A flat, low-margin night — Morocco sit in and the tie tightens, live to swing on extra time or penalties.

France: No glaring weakness — a balanced side on current form.
Morocco: Blunter in the final third — fewer clear chances created.

match_flow.text: Attacking substitutions as both benches go for it
Level at full time 0-0 — into extra time
France hold their nerve from the spot

turning_points: Level at full time 0-0 — into extra time
France hold their nerve from the spot
risk_factors: Margins are razor-thin — a single moment likely settles it.
Model confidence is modest (29/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: France carries the sharper attack (3.50 vs 1.88 xG/match).
France grades higher on form & big-match composure (32% vs 31%).
Edge from the spot: France convert ~77% vs Morocco ~76% — decisive if it goes to pens.
explainability.why_penalties: A shootout is unlikely (19%) — one side should settle it inside 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to France's key creator, or Morocco stealing a set-piece, flips it.

disclaimer: This platform is an AI-driven probability simulation built for entertainment and analytics purposes. Not betting advice.
